Text.text: * Dropped support for 10E legacy * Gaining or Decreasing CP via widget or overlay now is logged in chat for tracking. * Added colours to disposition picker for better matching * Added deployment picker based on disposition, currently we only have 3 deployment zones per disposition match up but that will change as GW shows more stuff. * Added VP limitations for primary, secondaries and total scores. * Changed scoreboard buttons * Added the option to change table mat (more to come!) * Lots of new tokens! * Major code cleanup.
